title: RecipeUnlocker
description: This plugins unlocks all minecraft recipes for new players on their firs join.
body:
✨ **RecipeUnlocker** ✨

- Unlock all crafting recipes for new players on their first join! 🚀
  
- No more tedious recipe grinding. Just plug and play!  🎮
  
- Simple, efficient, and perfect for your server. Get crafting instantly! ⚒️

✨ **Check Out Our Other Plugins!** ✨ If you enjoy the **RecipeUnlocker** plugin, don't forget to check out our other high-quality plugins for your server!

- **BuildByBit:** https://builtbybit.com/creators/fisfiskoray.600970
- **PolyMart:** https://polymart.org/user/57522/fisfiskoray
- **Modrinth:** https://modrinth.com/user/FisFisKoray
